Some learn to use weapons or tech from other native races, especially nukas, but as the divrani have no organized society, and their lusty aroma makes extended contact with others difficult at best, they have little hope of self-advancement. Confederate sources indicate that Uplifting existing members of the race will be very difficult, as will integrating them into society, unless they are separated from the radglow plant.
Hyraxi
Name: Hyrax (Singular), Hyraxi (Plural, Adjectival)
Sexes: Male and Female. Males are exponentially more common than females, perhaps 80% or more of the population. Note “Dual-soul” under Appearance.
Height: Average 6' 3\" to 6' 9\" (Male) or 6' 10\" to 7' 5\" (Female)

Hair: Thick, lustrous, and extremely soft hair covers the head, and similar fur coats the forelimbs and tail. Pubic and facial hair is noted to be exceptionally silky and smooth. Hair colors range from stone gray to dark browns and blues. Some rare cases of cyan blue or cream-white occur, especially in females.

Skin: Hyraxi have exposed skin on their upper limbs, torsos, and faces. Most Hyraxi are dark-skinned, ranging from coal-black to tans and brown. A minority population has skin in shades of gray, with lighter colorations tending towards heavy freckling due to sun exposure.

Ears: Hyraxi ears are lion-like in form but more accurately hyenine, resting at the top of the head. They are sensitive to sound outside the human-sense spectrum, and swivel to and fro in response to even the slightest noise.

Eyes: Hyraxi have slitted, cat-like eyes with a myriad of iris colors. Their eyesight is exceptionally keen in the dark or in low-light, but hyraxi vision is at best below average in daylight. Most wear heavy eye protection when forced out in the sun.
Feet & Legs: Hyraxi have digitigrade legs, with three large, clawed toes and a dew claw. Their legs are long for their size and extremely powerful, making them able sprinters and jumpers.
Aging: Hyraxi are relatively short-lived and fast growing, reaching maturity at about 10 years of age and living for up to 50 years.
Appearance

Hyraxi are large, powerfully-built feliform bipeds native to Phaedra II. The species stands on digitigrade legs with fur covering the extremities, and have expressive and thick-furred tails coupled with sensitive ears on the tops of their heads. They have bare, usually dark skin on the torso, head, and upper limbs. Some rare members have lion-like manes around their necks, and spotting of the fur is common. Females are noticeably larger, stronger, and more aggressive than males.

The hyraxi people were dramatically affected at a biological level by their planet’s apocalyptic war. While they themselves keep little record, it can be surmised that at one point, the race was fairly evenly divided between males and females. In the generations that followed, the species’ birthrate rapidly declined and, notably, the ratio of male to female became more and more skewed. Very few hyraxi births are female, likely less than 20%.

Females who are born have a hugely enlarged, phallic-shaped clitoris and oversized labia that partially fuse together to obscure and shroud the vagina, making penetration very difficult and tight to even the males’ smaller phalluses. This enlarged clitoris is much more sensitive than a male’s phallus, and can become at least partially erect (fully erect in some cases). Evidence, especially the highly-encouraged submissive, sexually receptive role of males in Hyraxi society, indicates it is commonly used for the penetration of others. However, this enlarged female sex also hampers both birth and insemination, putting yet another obstacle in the way Hyraxi fertility.

Males are comparatively slender and less muscular than females, with appearances varying from girlishly effeminate to chiseled masculinity. Males have a normal phallus-and-testicles combination between their legs, with a hybrid manhood tucked into a sheath. Their penises can grow from 4 to 8 inches when erect, come in shades from blood red to black, and have a single large knot at the base. The crown is tapered and covered in rings of small, sensitive bulbs of flesh.

The hyraxi also have a “third gender”, so to speak, that has arisen in the wake of the radiation bombing. These intersex individuals, commonly referred to as “dual-souls” by their people, are biologically male hyraxi that were likely originally female in the womb, but partially changed during gestation. In adulthood, these individuals grow to a female’s size and shape, including breasts, feminine features, and even the ability to induce lactation - the only indication of masculinity is their sexual organs, which are distinctly and completely male. Dual-soul hyraxi make up an additional 10-15% of the population, and are generally treated as women culturally.
Sexuality

The hyraxi are quite promiscuous sexually, especially among men. With low chances of mating with a female of their race, hyraxi males are rather well-known on Phaedra II for pursuing inter-species relations, high rates of homosexuality (especially with each other), and for their high libidos and easy-going attitudes towards sex. Males that don’t belong to a tribe are often integrated as prostitutes or harem-members in other species’ settlements.

Females and dual-souls of the race, on the other hand, have dramatically different outlooks towards sex. Given that hyraxi males are submissive by nature, especially towards females in the hopes of reproducing, feminine members of the species frequently use their tribe’s males for relief of tension and sexual frustration, using their penises or over-sized clitorises to anally penetrate the male (or, more rarely, allow him to anally penetrate her). Couplings are considered pleasant but meaningless at best, and hyraxi do not constrain this sexual activity to their mates. While males may use this behavior to ingratiate themselves to a female in hopes of proper mating, the other genders frequently take multiple passing partners, sometimes in large numbers at once.

Paradoxically for such a sexually active race, actual mating (ie, vaginal penetration) is extremely rare, taking place only between mated pairs. Hyraxi mate for life, usually with a single partner though sometimes to two or three males or dual-souls to a female, and form extremely close familial bonds. While members of these bonds still may engage non-vaginal sex outside the family, reproductive intercourse is strictly confined for both male and female to their mates. Unlike outside the family, where females rule with all but unquestioned authority, members of all sexes share equal responsibility and authority.
Reproduction

Hyraxi reproduction is, despite everything, relatively unremarkable. Though it is difficult and often requires external devices and a great deal of lubrication, male or dual-souls penetrate the female vagina and inseminate her. When successfully impregnated, a female hyraxi grows gravid and eventually gives birth to between 3 and 5 kits. Pregnancy lasts for about five months, during which time she becomes largely helpless due to her large size, and her breasts grow up to three cup sizes due to the onset of lactation.

Hyraxi childbirth is typically awkward and painful for the mother, with most preferring C-Section over natural birth due to the extremely tight, difficult-to-open vaginal passage. After birth, the mother and her mates care for the children for about a decade before they reach adulthood, at which point they join the tribe as equals to their parents. Young hyraxi kits tend to be rambunctious explorers as soon as they learn to walk - a real handful for the inexperienced - and are highly energetic.
History & Society

Hyraxi society is highly tribal, consisting of roving bands of nomads that scour the wastelands for resources, usually consisting of thirty to fifty families. Most tribes are led by a Matriarch, a veteran warrior female who dueled the previous Matriarch and won. The Matriarch is not an absolute ruler, but more like a “first citizen,” someone who guides the many families and helps them work together for the good of the tribe.

Different hyraxi tribes rarely cooperate, preferring to stay well away from each other in the interest of resources and mitigating the chance of infighting. Hyraxi are infamous on Phaedra II for holding grudges, even compared to the Nukas who have been in ideological conflict for generations. There is little more important to a hyraxi, especially a female, than her perceived honor. Skill at arms, sexual prowess, and cunning are all points of contention that hyraxi are particularly sensitive about.
Technology

Hyraxi naturally have a strong affinity for large, powerful vehicles due to their nomadic nature. While high tech is rare on their world, the hyraxi of all remaining races on Phaedra II have almost religiously maintained their vehicles. Trucks, buggies, jetbikes, and sports cars are all frequently seen in Hyraxi camps, amongst huge cargo crawlers that transport a tribe’s heavy belongings. They are extremely adept at vehicular combat, preferring lightning-fast skirmishes over protracted combat.

Other than that, Hyraxi technology is unremarkable for their planet. Robotics, functioning firearms, and computers are relatively rare but not unheard of amongst their tribes. Most hyraxi warriors, especially feminine ones, prefer to fight with spears and polearms (preferably from the side of a high-speed car or bike).

Name: Shalinae (plural), Shalin (singular), Shalin (adjective) Sexes: Male and Female Height: 7 to 11 feet tall. Weight: 250 to 500 lbs. Eyes: Violet, blue, or green with round pupils. Feather Coloration: Varies based on tribe and geological location with brown most common in the local area. Skin Coloration: Comparable to Terran and avian standards (where appropriate). Lifespan: 60 years.

Shalinae appear as a hybrid of a giant avian (bird) and a terran, fused together at the base of what would be the former’s neck and the latter’s waist. As a result they’ve been dubbed ‘bird-taurs’ by galactic slang - an appellation that has come to be considered to be largely correct since they conform to most expectations of that phenotype: two arms, two hands, opposable thumbs, a nose, a mouth, and even male pectorals and female breasts. This continues below the waist with two meaty avian legs, talons, feathers, a bird-like body segment, and two feathered wings (each almost as wide as a terran is tall).
	
	Where their anatomy differs is the details. Their feathers grow with an organic titanium-alloy lattice that makes them tough enough to deflect most chemically propelled projectile weapons and light enough to aid in flight. Their talons, teeth, and bones make use of a similar composite, allowing them to bite or claw through aluminum and softer [silly|steeles|steel] with ease. Even more interesting is their top half’s ultra-light muscle and organ tissue - close to Terran in terms of strength and capability but nearly half as dense, allowing the seemingly front-heavy creatures to trot around and flutter with perfect balance.
	
	Shalinae ears also differ greatly from the Terran design. They’re upraised, narrow, and pointed at the tip - more like some ausars’ - but with a feathery exterior instead of fur. The unique alloys in their chemical makeup even allow them to sense magnetic fields with their aural organs, guiding stranded Shalinae home with surprising speed and accuracy. Some theorists suspect the species’ aversion to technology has its roots in this sensing ability, believing the shifting magnetic fluxes produced by modern electronics register as an unpleasant sensation

A “bird-taur’s” reproductive anatomy resides on their avian half, on the underside, just beneath the tailfeathers. Both females and males have a cloaca, with the male’s concealing the penis while flaccid. Two internal testes supply semen through a large penis of anywhere from 18 to 32 inches of length. This allows the large-bodied creatures to more easily mount each other. The male’s penis has three bulging ‘bands’ about its length that stimulate the female’s deeply-recessed clitoris during penetration, with the bottommost swelling somewhat just before (and during) orgasm. Shalinae penises have a human-like “crown,” lending them remarkable bio-compatibility with U.G.C. recognized species. The female vagina is deep, elastic, and ringed in incredibly powerful muscles strong enough to lock a mate’s penis inside by the ringed bands around its circumference. This securing reflex appears to kick in during female orgasms but may also be performed consciously according to seven independent researchers’ very enthusiastic reports on the matter. The vaginal exterior is otherwise unremarkable. A clitoris is present, though recessed into the cloaca enough that it does not visibly present itself, even while engorged into a ¾" (20mm) bulb. Orgasm with shallower penetrations is still possible thanks to this organ, but Shalinae females frequently express sentiment preferring larger lovers. Fertilization results in a single offspring. TamaniCorp scientists have expressed interest in researching the lack of any twin births so that they can “cure” it. Xenogen researchers have petitioned numerous times for access to a steady supply of genetic material to research but have been stymied by the convoluted legal status of the planet currently being untangled by Confederate authorities. Pregnancies last for nearly one full year, after which a watermelon-size egg is laid. The eggs are remarkably durable, with thick shells reinforced by organic metal alloys and a surprising tolerance for high heats. During cooler nights, a parent will squat atop it to maintain warmth; the unborn Shalin are much more vulnerable to cold than their feathered forebears. Eggs seem to trigger a singing impulse in nearby adults, resulting in a near ceaseless stream of input for the unborn’s consciousness, rich with the collective history and knowledge of these primitive peoples. Hatching is assisted by an adult’s talons. No matter how sharp the young bird-person’s developing claws may be, they lack the strength to crack the thick shell. It is up to an outsider to assist in their egress and welcome them into the world. Shalinae young emerge fully capable of understanding their people’s speech, even if they lack the fine motor control and muscular conditioning necessary to speak themselves. In a few days, they’re talking. Childhood passes quickly on Phaedra II’s irradiated plains. By ten years of age, they are considered adults of their people, and display all the hallmarks of sexual maturity. At 14, they reach their full height. This seemingly accelerated aging continues through their entire lives. Menopause sets in by 45, and the average Shalin does not live beyond his or her sixth decade.

Bird-taurs are a tribal people, preferring the wilds of their homeworld over the Nuka cities or Hyraxi convoys. Most are nomadic, making use of their mobility to cross great expanses of terrain when food becomes scarce or threats arise. Portable shelters can be easily deconstructed and carried on their capable backs. Woven harnesses with sophisticated baskets allow an adult shalin to jog for miles with hundreds of pounds of food and other cargo. They pass the time on such trips by singing to each other, reinforcing their verbal histories and warning away any predatory animals in the vicinity.
	
	Few would wish to battle a flock of the massive creatures.
	
	The tunes they sing are curated by a small group of elite “Song Wardens.” These shamanistic birdfolk are responsible for protecting the lyrics of their oral histories and knowledge from change, and they ceaselessly drill their acolytes on the correct words of their thousands of musical passages. Most tribes hold their Song Wardens in a position of honor. It is their duty to advise and report to the tribe’s leadership so that the lessons of history are not forgotten. So great is their cultural memory that some equatorial groups still recall how to manufacture snowshoes, or treat hypothermia.

	Of course, any tribal culture becomes home to a great amount of variation. The Shalinae are no different. Some tribes have chiefs. Some have councils of elders. Some appear to be pure republics. The variation expresses itself physically as well. Hunting-focused tribes often become capable fliers with forms like hawks. Fishing groups have bodies and plumage similar to terran ducks. Roaming traders often come to have flashy plumage like a parrot. And the lost tribes - those whose Song Wardens died or were rejected - are the most varied of all, freely absorbing exiles into their ranks or merging with the meager leftovers of tribe-annihilating hyraxi raids.
	
	Some lost tribes even dare to use technology after training for months to ignore the pain of fluxing magnetic fields or learning to identify which kinds of machines are safely, magnetically deadened. Truly the Shalinae are a fascinating people, though unlikely to make a significant mark in the greater UGC beyond any genetic quirks the MegaCorporations decide to make use of. Uplifting of any source is inadvisable, and a Shalin that wishes to enter the electromagnetic hellstorm of space is as rare as a winning lottery ticket.

Name: Nuka (Plural: Nukas, Adjective: Nukae) Sexes: Male and Female. Both present as “female” by galactic standards. Height: Six to seven Terran feet. Weight: Comparable to Terran standard. Eyes: Standard pupils veiled by a secondary eyelid (white). Body Coloration: Vibrant hues of yellow, orange, and red (males) with “cooler” colors like blue and purple for the females. Other Notable Features: No hair, a single head tentacle of variable length, a large tail, and two hoof-like toes. Lifespan: Functionally immortal.

To any experienced galactic wanderer, nukas would appear as just another bipedal sapient among many - one more race of form-compatible aliens to integrate into the galactic whole - and however right they might be, the nukas bear a collection of interesting adaptations rarely seen outside their native Phaedra II. The first feature many notice on a clothed nuka is the prominent tentacle which sprouts from the crown of the skull. This tentacle is more than just another head adornment. It’s a sensory organ and psionic amplifier, granting the entire species touch-limited telepathy and sensory projection. The dense web of nerves and supporting muscle tissue allows it to be more dexterous than a Terran’s fingers. Mated pairs will often slumber their ‘tikku’ (head tentacles) entwined, allowing them to share dreams together. Next comes the tail - a thick, muscled limb that tapers to a rounded, quarter-inch diameter at the end of its three foot length. It is not scaled or adorned with the coverings found on reptilian-patterned species. Thick skin and instinctive muscular action protects it from dangerous ground while toughening it enough to be used as a whip-like weapon by agitated nukas. When healthy, it appears glossy from the nuka’s natural skin oils, and slick enough to yank from an attacker’s hand or slither into an appropriate orifice. See: [[LINK REDACTED. UNSAFE EXTRANET SITE.]]. Nuka faces appear in mostly familiar structure: two eyes with common mammalian pupillary structure and a pair of pouty lips beneath. No nose is present, and the pupils are usually concealed beneath a whitish secondary eyelid to shield them from the harsh glare of their suns. In nukae culture, pulling back these membranes is seen as an act of intimacy nearly on par with love-making, leading them to view many Rushers as even more brazen and lewd than the most debauched nuka.

Female nukae reproductive anatomy resembles the standard form taken by most life in the galaxy: a genital slit with a single clitoris, largely identical to that of a terran’s. Where they differ is in the physical act of reproduction; nukas are an egg-laying species. Roughly once every two months, a nuka will lay a whitish, oblong egg. The eggs are typically a foot in length and up to four inches in diameter, but samples as small as six inches and as long as eighteen have been documented. First lays are reported to be somewhat painful, which each lay after reported to be, “increasingly pleasurable”.
	
	“Egg hotels” are a common sight in larger nukae settlements - a place a female nuka can stop to spend a night offloading her bi-monthly egg and relaxing in the afterglow, after which she can depart with it - or leave it to be disposed of - usually as garbage or a treat for a pet species.
	
	Fertilization can take place for up to a week after laying. The male nuka will take their partner’s egg and insert it into their own genital slit, for male nukas lack the visible penis or testicles found on other races. Instead, they have a larger, somewhat meatier clitoris that can grow up two two inches long and almost as wide. This clitoris will release its sperm in the form of a clitoral foam released by the act of penetration. Nukae eggshells are highly permeable to this moisture, and are almost always fertilized when used this way. For this reason, ‘accidents’ are unheard of in their culture.
	
	Egg rearing is simpler than in terran avians. The eggs are temperature stable and do not need to be incubated by body heat. A blanket or two in colder weather is all that is needed. Once a day, the egg must be bathed in a nutrient-rich food paste in order to fuel the unborn’s growth, and after seven or so months, a newborn nuka will emerge tail-horn first, though the horn is soon shed in order to prevent damage to the mother.
	
	Additional nutrients are provided to the toddler-like newborn via regurgitation of partially digested foods through their “lipple” ducts. (For more information, see “Lipples” below.) After a few weeks of this, the young nukas gut flora is sufficiently developed for them to be weaned onto a galactic standard omnivorous diet.
	
	Juvenile nukas mature in 30 years culturally but are biological adults by the age of 15.

Despite the presence of breast tissue on male and female nukas, they do not have nipples. Where nipples would be, one will instead discover a pair of lush, full lips - large by Terran standards and as soft as a pleasure-trained galotian’s. Their purpose is not inherently sexual but instead defensive.
	
	Phaedra II’s lushest zones, where nukas likely began their evolution, are home to a species of predator plants known only as ‘plugs’. This devious flora hunts by propelling itself from a pod via chemical reaction and lodging itself in the throat of a victim species and anchoring itself in place with numbing spines. Nukas managed to escape predation by developing auxiliary breathing channels on the chest, through the lipples. Scientists theorize that a gastric linkage evolved later to ease the rearing of freshly hatched young.
	
	Nukas do not typically view their lipples in a sexual light. Their presence is rarely concealed on their home-world, where it is more comfortable to breathe through all three unimpeded. Nukas in the presence of coreward species quickly learn to conceal their breasts in public, an act they find uncomfortable at first but can adapt to over a few weeks. These cultural differences further fuel the nukae perception that coreward species are perverse.
	
	Despite their cultural reservations, nukae lipples can and have been used as a recreational sexual zone, often at the prompting of a Rusher. Reports indicate the lipples lack teeth or tongues and are instead lined with rows of slick, undulating cilia that can gently massage intruders further in - or out - at the nuka’s whim.

Nukas are inherently psionic at a subconscious level but lack the necessary brain structures for conscious control or greater manipulation than earlier documented. Their potential with cybernetic augmentation is theorized to match some of the premier psionic species in the galaxy, easily outpacing the nascent efforts of humanity, slyveren, and rodenian alike. Partially substantiated rumor indicates confederate military brass are interested in their potential as uplifted psionic warriors, thanks to their large stature, redundant aspiration orifices, weaponizable tails, and mental potential.\n\t\n\tThe UGC denies any such considerations have been made and officially and strongly dismisses any accusations of weaponizing freshly Rushed races.

Nuka genomes feature highly redundant triplets of DNA. Much like spaceborne computers, an error in one place can be detected and corrected by the paired redundancies. Damage from radiation is fixed in real time, rendering them immune to all but the most focused of exposure. As a result, Nukas are nearly immune to cancer and most effects of aging, resulting in near immortality. Xenogen has already expressed interest in sampling this feature, but legal entanglements with KihaCorp have kept them from the planet for now.
	
	Surprisingly, this genetic resilience does not make them immune to modification - only sophisticated ones. A transformation that relies on altering a single sequence in each cell via high-end microsurgeons will have no lasting effect on a nuka, but a ‘dumb’ mod like the street drug Throbb that bombards the system with microsurgeons that replace every eligible sequence they can find will work just fine - and resist the lighter touches employed by most corrective treatments.
	
	Rushers should not fear nukas carrying residual radiation from exposure. Their bodies’ microbiomes have already adapted to break down radioactive material into its inert parts, leaving scientists puzzled at the rapid adaptation on a slow-to-evolve species.
Aegis Shipyards
translation: 宙斯盾造船厂

original: Company Name: Aegis Shipyards LLC
translation: 公司名称： 宙斯盾造船厂有限责任公司

original: Industry: Technology manufacturer
translation: 行业： 科技制造商

original: Aegis Shipyards LLC is considered something of a luxury ship company by the general populace. They typically pack their ships full of the latest tech: high quality shields and engines. However, they rarely armor their vessels to any significant degree.
translation: 宙斯盾造船厂在老百姓眼里算是一家豪华飞船制造商。他们的船向来塞满了最新科技：高品质护盾、顶级引擎，但几乎从不给船体加装像样的装甲。

original: Bell-Isle/Grunmann
translation: 贝尔-艾尔/格兰曼

original: Company Name: Bell-Isle/Grunmann
translation: 公司名称： 贝尔-艾尔/格兰曼

original: Industry: Colonial technology mega-corporation
translation: 行业： 殖民科技巨型企业

original: Head Office: Terra, Sol System
translation: 总部：泰拉，太阳系

original: Bell-Isle/Grunmann was an early Terran mega-corporation, existing before first contact with other races, during the age when human ships were still “slow boating” between star systems. The company sponsored several colony ships, including the Nova, and provided cutting-edge technology for colonists. The company appears to have disappeared long before the 14th Planet Rush, as extranet records of them are rare to nonexistent -- the company likely collapsed centuries ago.
translation: 贝尔-艾尔/格兰曼是人类早期的巨型企业，在与其他种族首次接触之前就已存在，当时人类的飞船还在恒星系统之间“慢悠悠地航行”。该公司赞助了包括新星号在内的多艘殖民飞船，并为殖民者提供尖端技术。该公司似乎早在第十四次大淘星潮之前就已经消失了，因为外联网上关于他们的记录非常罕见，甚至根本不存在——这家公司很可能在几个世纪前就已经倒闭了。

original: The Camarilla
translation: 卡马利亚

original: Company Name: The Camarilla (formally the Gyre Grand Camarilla, or G.G.C.)
translation: 公司名称：卡马利亚（正式名称为泽亚尔远大卡马利亚，或 G.G.C.）

original: Industry: Political corporation, United-species government
translation: 行业：政治公司，多种族联合政府

original: Formerly the G.G.C., the Camarilla is the central government of the toves. Acting as a pan-galactic corporation, it encourages the participation of individuals by means of buyable votes. Camarilla policy is decided by the majority of votes, and votes are purchasable from the Camarilla. Smaller policy changes usually result in cheaper costs for votes, while major decisions often cost millions of credits per vote. For a tove to effect change in his/her government, he/she must first accumulate a sizable fortune
translation: 卡马利亚的前身是 G.G.C.，是托维人的中央政府。作为一个泛银河公司，它通过购买选票的方式鼓励个人参与。卡马利亚的政策由多数选票决定，选票可以从卡马利亚购买。较小的政策变化通常只需较低的选票成本，而重大决策的每张选票往往需要花费数百万信用点。托维人要想改变自己的政府，必须首先积累可观的财富。

original: J’ejune
translation: 杰俊

original: Company Name: J’ejune Corporation and J’ejune Pharmaceutical
translation: 公司名称： 杰俊公司和杰俊制药

original: Industry: Commercial products, Food, Drugs, Cosmetics
translation: 行业：商业产品、食品、药品、化妆品

original: A mid-level corporation with nothing outstanding about them. With a product lineup that’s either bland or trying too hard, J’ejune are mostly know as being cheap and somewhat lacking in quality control. They’ll do the least amount of testing possible to get things approved for legal sale and their manufacturing habits frequently cause added - normally harmless and minor - effects to their products. The random scent one smells from Libidoze and the random flavor of Blu’Cow being good examples; a product like Rainbotox would be right up their alley. They’re not incompetent (if they were, they’d be out of business by now), just cheap and unimaginative. It’s highly unlikely they’d ever get medical or military contracts.
translation: 一家中等规模的公司，毫无出彩之处。杰俊的产品线要么寡淡无味，要么用力过猛，这家公司主要以廉价和品控松懈著称。为了拿到合法销售许可，他们能少做一次测试就绝不多做，而他们的生产习惯又常常给产品带来额外的——通常无害且轻微——副作用。力比多泽那股随机的气味、蓝牛那种随机的口味，就是很好的例子；彩虹毒这样的产品，简直是为他们量身定做的。他们并非无能（真要是无能，早就倒闭了），只是廉价又缺乏想象力。他们几乎不可能拿到医疗或军方的合同。

original: JoyCo
translation: 乔伊公司

original: Company Name: JoyCo
translation: 公司名称： 乔伊公司

original: Industry: Medical, Commercial, Retail
translation: 行业： 医疗、商业、零售

original: JoyCo is a support company that runs outpost hospitals in exchange for a cut of future exports from said planets. They provide top of the line medicines and run a chain of hypermarkets and discount department stores.
translation: 乔伊公司是一家支援企业，通过在各星球经营前哨医院，换取这些星球未来出口的分成。他们提供顶尖的药品，并经营连锁大型超市和折扣百货商店。

original: KihaCorp
translation: 奇哈集团

original: Company Name: KihaCorp
translation: 公司名称： 奇哈集团

original: Industry: Artificial intelligence and technology manufacturer and distributor
translation: 行业：人工智能与技术制造商和分销商

original: KihaCorp is currently the top A.I. manufacturer in the galaxy. It rose to prominence after producing a hit “Tsundere” organic A.I. line. At first, they sold quite poorly, but after humorous holos spread on the extranet, sales began to climb. Today, KihaCorp dominates the A.I. marketplace with a wide array of grown A.I. personalities and classifications. They’ve also branched into the ship manufacturing market in the past decade, producing vehicles that are known for having good armor and potent power cores. Unfortunately, their less than stellar cargo and crew space has prevented them from becoming too popular in that market.
translation: 奇哈集团是当下银河系顶尖的人工智能制造商。它靠一条爆款“傲娇”有机人工智能产品线声名鹊起。起初销量惨淡，但幽默的全息影像在外联网上疯传后，销量便开始攀升。如今，奇哈集团凭借五花八门的成长型人工智能人格与分类，称霸人工智能市场。过去十年，他们还进军了飞船制造领域，生产的飞船以装甲坚固、动力核心强劲著称。可惜，货舱和乘员空间不尽人意，阻碍了他们在该市场走红。

original: Nova Securities
translation: 新星安保

original: Company Name: Nova Securities
translation: 公司名称： 新星安保

original: Industry: Private military
translation: 行业： 私营军事

original: Nova securities is THE ubiquitous private security organization of the galactic frontier. Large, well-funded, and blessed with minimal Confederate oversight, Nova has grown from backwater planetary bodyguards to a massive paramilitary with ships and manpower to rival some planets’ standing armies. Nova Securities operate as mercenaries for frontier worlds, guards for wealthy Mega Corporations and bodyguards for billionaire playboys. Most Nova operators are ex-military, especially their officers, and many have battle experience. Moreover, their equipment is state of the art, both for ground personnel and aboard their ships.
translation: 新星安保是银河边疆无处不在的私人保安组织。新星公司规模庞大、资金雄厚，而且很少受到邦联的监督，它已从落后的行星保镖发展成为一支庞大的准军事部队，其战舰和人力可与一些行星的常备军相媲美。新星安保为边疆世界提供雇佣兵服务，为富有的巨型公司提供警卫服务，为亿万富翁的花花公子提供保镖服务。大多数新星操作员都是退伍军人，尤其是他们的军官，许多人都有战斗经验。此外，他们的装备也是最先进的，无论是地面人员还是他们的飞船。

original: Pyrite Industries
Company Name: Pyrite Heavy Industries
translation: 公司名称： 黄铁重工

original: Industry: Industrial and manufacturing
translation: 行业：工业和制造业

original: Pyrite Industries is an industrial and manufacturing powerhouse. Their equipment is used around the galaxy, but out on the rim, where regulations are typically more lax, their most brutal and efficient machinery can be brought to bear. Tunnel borers, plasma cutters, geological surveying equipment, and similar devices are some of the highest selling items in their catalog.
translation: 黄铁重工是工业和制造业的巨擘。他们的设备遍布银河，但在法规通常更为宽松的边缘星域，他们那些最凶悍、最高效的机械才能真正大显身手。隧道掘进机、等离子切割机、地质勘测设备等等，都是他们产品目录中最畅销的品类。

original: Pyrite Industries also manufactures ships. Their ship designs typically prioritize spacious cargo bays and decent engines over all else.
translation: 黄铁重工也制造飞船。他们的设计一贯优先考虑宽敞的货舱和过得去的引擎，其他方面则退居其次。

original: Reaper Armaments
translation: 死神武备

original: Company Name: Reaper Armaments (also known as Reaper Industries)
translation: 公司名称： 死神武备（也被称为死神工业）

original: Industry: Weapons manufacturing
translation: 行业：武器制造

original: Reaper Armaments is a heavy industrial conglomerate which grew out of private military contractors and arms manufacturing organizations. They made the galaxy-famous Mk-5 Battle Rifle, called the “Workhorse” by the Terran troops, which has been in service for nearly fifty years in a dozen militaries. Reaper Armaments also makes dozens of handguns, cannons, and rifles as well as jeeps, tanks, and experimental powered armor.
translation: 死神武备是一家重工业巨头，由私人军事承包商和武器制造商合并而成。他们生产的Mk-5战斗步枪名震银河，被泰拉士兵称为“老黄牛”，服役近五十年，列装于十余国军队。此外，从手枪、火炮、步枪，到吉普、坦克，乃至实验性动力装甲，死神武备均有涉猎。

original: RhenWorld
translation: 雷恩世界

original: Company Name: RhenWorld Stellar Excavations
translation: 公司名称： 雷恩世界星际发掘

original: Industry: Mining
translation: 产业： 采矿

original: Founder: Rhenesuune family
translation: 创始人： Rhenesuune家族

original: A very old leithan mining corporation, of which Steele Tech has 50% ownership. The company is otherwise owned and operated by the descendants of its founders, the Rhenesuune family. Currently, RhenWorld is not publicly traded.
translation: 这是一家历史悠久的雷坦人矿业公司，斯蒂尔科技拥有其50%的股份。除此之外，公司由创始人Rhenesuune家族的后裔拥有和经营。目前，雷恩世界尚未公开上市。

original: SagiTom
translation: 箭头安全

original: Company Name: SagiTom Solutions
translation: 公司名称：箭头安全

original: Industry: Private military
translation: 行业： 私营军事

original: SagiTom Solutions is a large scale private security firm that operates throughout the Milky Way. Whilst primarily focused upon corporate security, the company also offers mercenary contraction, starship convoying and bounty hunting services. SagiTom markets itself as a specialist PMC; relatively small in comparison to OHGR or mercenary groups operating under the Black Void umbrella, it promises clean, efficient operations carried out by highly trained, well-vetted and well-equipped soldiers at premium prices.
translation: 箭头安全是一家业务遍布银河系的大型私人安保公司。虽然主营企业安保，但公司也承接佣兵合同、星舰护航和赏金猎杀等业务。箭头安全以专业私人军事公司自居；比起OHGR或黑虚空旗下的佣兵团，规模虽小，却承诺以精锐之师执行干净利落的行动——当然，要价不菲。

original: Background
translation: 背景

original: SagiTom is the brainchild of former kaithrit freebooter Grettin ans Loderre and human white collar criminal Hendon Schulz. The two met in an orbital prison during the Twelfth Planetary Rush, and according to their own accounts bonded over a shared love of astrology; ‘SagiTom’ is a portmanteau of Sagittarius and Haurtom, constellations interpreted as tauric archers by ancient human and kaithrit civilisations alike. A lawyer by training, Schulz aided ans Loderre in beating 11 charges of piracy, battery, rape and aggravated assault. A year after Schulz was released the two of them founded the business, with the aim of creating a mercenary group that was legally watertight, more efficient and more trustworthy than competitors.
translation: 箭头安全是前凯斯里特自由劫匪格雷廷·安斯·洛德雷和人类白领罪犯亨登·舒尔茨的心血结晶。两人在第十二次大淘星潮期间于一座轨道监狱中相遇，据他们自己说，是对占星术的共同爱好让他们走到了一起；“箭头安全”这个名字，是“射手座”与“豪尔托姆”的合体，这两个星座在古代人类和凯斯里特文明中，都被解读为半人马的弓箭手。舒尔茨是律师出身，曾帮助安斯·洛德雷打赢了官司，洗脱了海盗、殴打、强奸和严重伤害等十一项指控。舒尔茨获释一年后，两人共同创立了这家公司，旨在打造一个在法律上无懈可击、比同行更高效、更值得信赖的雇佣兵组织。

original: In this the company has been a qualified success; during the centuries of its operation numerous court cases have been brought against STS - most notably accusations of protection racketeering and involvement in drug and gene-mod smuggling - but the charges have always been beaten, and the company heavily remunerated each time.
translation: 就这一点而言，箭头安全算得上成功，只是略有瑕疵。公司运营数百年间，官司缠身——最引人注目的，是指控其收取保护费，以及参与毒品和基因改造走私——但这些指控最终都被一一化解，公司每次还都拿到了巨额赔偿。

original: Philosophy
translation: 哲学

original: As well as signing an NDA, all SagiTom recruits are required to pass a vigorous vetting process that aims to test mental and emotional acumen as well as physical. The company favors hiring combat vets and former criminals intelligent and level-headed enough to either shave years off their sentences or evade sentencing entirely.
translation: 除了签署保密协议，所有箭头安全的新人都必须通过一套严苛的审查。这套审查不仅考验体能，更旨在测试心智与情绪的敏锐度。公司偏爱招募退伍老兵和有前科的罪犯——只要他们足够聪明冷静，能为自己减刑数年，甚至全身而退。

original: STS’s official operation philosophy is “Target down without a sound”. Heavy emphasis is placed upon data analysis, surveillance and meticulous planning before any mission, with the intention of defeating opponents before a shot is even fired. This feeds into their decorated corporate security division, where the express aim is highly effective protection without STS’s clients even being aware of the presence of heavily armed mercs.
translation: 箭头安全的官方行动理念是“无声击倒目标”。他们极度重视数据分析、监视与周密规划，力求在开枪之前便已击败对手。这一理念也渗透进他们备受赞誉的企业安保部门，其明确目标是在客户浑然不觉的情况下，提供高效保护，尽管全副武装的雇佣兵就近在咫尺。

original: With this in mind, STS favor tech specialists and long range single target weaponry over close combat units, droids and explosives. The organization prides itself however on its capacity to take on any target a client capable of affording them can name, so maintains arousal-based operatives as well as more heavy duty military equipment and spacecraft.
translation: 有鉴于此，箭头安全更倚重技术专家和远程单目标武器，而非近战部队、机器人和炸药。不过，该组织引以为傲的是，只要客户出得起价，任何目标都能拿下，因此旗下既有以色侍人的特工，也保有重型军备和飞船。

original: Snugglé
Company Name: Snugglé
Industry: Agriculture and foods product manufacturer and distributor
translation: 行业：农业与食品制造商和分销商

original: Snugglé are a food, beverage and agricultural business conglomerate. Originally founded in the Balle neutral trading zone from the shells of several other food concerns following the Great Protein Crisis of 2771, Snugglé expanded over the years and, following several large scale leveraged buy-outs, are the largest such company in the galaxy today. Although originally a producer of human and ausar food, a desire to be competitive in as many markets as possible has led Snugglé’s expansion into producing a wide variety of nutrition, and their logo is recognizable on almost any shop shelf in the galaxy.
translation: 依胃是一家食品、饮料和农业企业集团。2771年蛋白质大危机过后，几家食品公司仅剩空壳，依胃在巴勒中立贸易区应运而生。此后多年不断扩张，又经历数次大规模杠杆收购，如今已是银河系同类企业中规模最大的一家。依胃起初只生产人类和奥萨尔人的食品，但为了在更多市场站稳脚跟，逐步将产品线拓展到各类营养品，如今银河系几乎任何一家商店的货架上，都能看到依胃的标志。

original: One of the pioneers of corporate planet purchasing - partially because they were one of the few original companies with the assets to accomplish such a thing - Snugglé own 41 agri-worlds today, many of them terraformed specifically to provide maximal output. This vast source of home-grown produce provides them with an unprecedented market advantage within the U.G.C. The labor laws on these planets and other out-sourced Snugglé installations have drawn much criticism, however the company have made efforts to offset this with their commitment to prisoner rehabilitation and native outreach schemes.
translation: 作为企业星球采购的先驱之一——部分原因是他们是少数几家拥有资产来实现这一目标的原始公司之一——依胃公司目前拥有41个农业世界，其中许多是专门为提供最大产出而改造的。这些星球上的劳动法和依胃外包的其他设施招致了许多批评，但该公司通过致力于囚犯改造和本土推广计划，努力抵消了这些批评。

original: Steele Tech
Company Name: Steele Industrial Technology and Production
Industry: Mining
translation: 行业：矿业

original: Founder: Victor Steele
translation: 创立者： 维克多·斯蒂尔

original: Steele Industrial Technology and Production specializes in mining and obtaining rare and elusive materials, though they do work with more mundane valuables like iron and lithium as well. Steele Tech has stayed out of many of the intercorporate politics that plague the U.G.C., causing it to remain a bit smaller than its rivals while simultaneously helping to avoid excess litigation. Steele Tech treats most of its employees like family, and gets high marks across the board for safety.
translation: 斯蒂尔工业技术与生产公司专精于开采和获取稀有难寻的材料，不过铁和锂这类寻常的贵重资源他们也做。斯蒂尔科技远离了困扰银河联合邦联的诸多跨公司政治纷争，因此规模虽比对手略小，却也免去了不少官司缠身的麻烦。斯蒂尔科技待员工如家人，安全方面更是有口皆碑。

original: Xenogen Biotech
Company Name: Xenogen Biotech
Industry: Gene therapy and modification
translation: 行业：基因治疗和修饰

original: Xenogen Biotech is a relative newcomer to rise to prominence on the galactic stage. They’ve earned a reputation for quality gene therapy mods that work faster and more effectively than the competition. Gene therapies that range from cosmetic enhancements to hostile environment adaptation for races migrating to different climes have been produced under this company’s roofs.
translation: 异星生物技术公司是银河舞台上崛起的新秀。他们以比竞争对手更快、更有效的优质基因治疗模式赢得了声誉。该公司生产的基因治疗产品从美容效果到适应恶劣环境，适用于迁移到不同气候的种族。

original: Out on the rim, there are many Xenogen installations and facilities, many of which are rumored to engage in questionable and unethical research. There have even been suggestions that the company is tied to the illegal slave trade, selling research specimens it has finished with as permanent indentured servants. Nothing has ever been proven, and so long as their products work better than the competition’s, they’ll continue to hold a strong market share.
translation: 在边缘星域，异种基因公司的设施遍布各处，其中不少据传都涉足可疑且不道德的研究。甚至有说法称，这家公司与非法奴隶贸易有染，将用完的研究样本当作永久契约仆役出售。不过这些指控从未得到证实，只要他们的产品比竞争对手更胜一筹，就仍能牢牢占据市场。

original: The Black Void

One of the galaxy’s most notorious criminal syndicates, commonly called pirates after the high seas-era brigands of Terra. The Black Void has been operating for at least three centuries, growing out of hundreds of different crime empires on several worlds during the last Planet Rush. Operating on the very fringes of galactic society, the vast fleets of pirate ships are able to raid the newly settled colonies with virtual impunity, beyond the reach of U.G.C. law enforcement.

Indeed, the utter lack of response the Void’s piracy has merited from Confederate officials has led many to suspect that the organization has corrupted key officials, though no proof of this infiltration has ever surfaced.
translation: 邦联官员对黑色虚空的海盗行径毫无反应，这不禁让人怀疑，该组织早已买通了关键人物。当然，这种渗透至今查无实据。

original: In the core worlds, the Void has a strong influence in vice to this day, though not as strong as it once was. With millions of worlds, even the largest organizations must give way to local syndicates and crime lords, though many pay “respects” to the Black Void. The area where the Void most excels, as far as core-world crime goes, is slavery: most crime groups refuse to deal in it, or don’t have the resources to manage a full slaver ring, but the Void dominates the market. While the pirates capture slaves on the fringe, the prisoners are cataloged and shipped to the core, where they’re sold in underground dens, usually as deep-space laborers or as pleasure slaves.
translation: 在核心世界，黑色虚空至今仍对罪恶勾当有着强大的影响力，尽管已不如往昔。面对数以百万计的世界，即便是最大的组织也得给地方集团和犯罪头目让路，不过许多人都向黑虚空表示“敬意”。就核心世界的犯罪而言，黑色虚空最擅长的领域是奴隶制：大多数犯罪集团要么拒绝涉足，要么没有资源管理完整的贩奴网络，但黑虚空却牢牢掌控着市场。海盗们在边缘地带抓捕奴隶，俘虏被登记造册后运往核心世界，在地下巢穴中贩卖，通常沦为深空劳工或享乐奴隶。

original: The Joint Ausar Federation
translation: 奥萨尔联合邦国

original: The Joint Ausar Federation is a loose alliance of independent ausar worlds, all of whom have sworn subservience to Ausaril, the homeworld, and its Star-King. The J.A.F. is primarily a military/self-defense alliance, born out of the early days of Warp Gate travel which quickly sparked interstellar wars between the far-flung ausar colonies. Alongside their close allies in the Terran-Space Coalition, the J.A.F. is one of the most powerful and influential groups in the galaxy, and retains vast military and scientific support.
translation: 奥萨尔联合邦国是一个由独立奥萨尔人星球组成的松散联盟，所有成员均宣誓效忠于母星奥萨瑞尔及其星王。奥萨尔联合邦国本质上是一个军事/自卫同盟，诞生于折跃门旅行早期——当时这项技术迅速在相隔遥远的奥萨尔殖民地之间引发了星际战争。与泰拉空间联盟中的亲密盟友并肩而立，奥萨尔联合邦国是银河系中最强大、最具影响力的势力之一，并保有庞大的军事与科研支持。

original: As one of its largest and founding members, the J.A.F. has a strong influence over the United Galactic Confederacy and the Confederate Parliament.
translation: 作为其最大的创始成员之一，J.A.F.对银河联合邦联和邦联议会有着举足轻重的影响力。

original: History:
translation: 历史：

original: The Joint Ausar Federation was created in the aftermath of the Gate Wars, fought by the ausar, shortly after the Warp Gates first came online between their systems. With no allegiance or communication between the disparate colonies, each governed by an all-powerful king, interstellar wars of conquest quickly broke out all through ausar space. Several worlds were destroyed outright. Only through several high-profile political marriages and threats by the Gates’ designers to shut the network down completely did the fighting slowly come to a stop. When it did, the Star-King of Ausaril convened several of his fellow autocrats and insisted upon a new alliance, now that the ausar worlds were able to communicate with one another for the first time since their foundings. Several generations of negotiations passed before the Joint Ausar Federation we know today emerged: a council of leaders and kings representing several hundred worlds in a parliamentary-style government overseen by the Star-King of Ausaril.
translation: 奥萨尔联合邦国成立于星门战争之后。那场战争由奥萨尔人亲手点燃——就在星门网络刚刚连通他们星系后不久。当时，各个殖民地互不统属，彼此隔绝，各自听命于一位大权独揽的国王。星际征服战火迅速席卷整个奥萨尔空间，数个世界被彻底摧毁。最终，靠着几场高调的政治联姻，以及星门设计者威胁要彻底关闭整个网络，战火才渐渐平息。硝烟散去后，奥萨瑞尔的星王召集了几位同僚君主，坚称既然奥萨尔诸世界自建立以来首次得以互通音讯，就必须缔结新的联盟。经过几代人的谈判，我们今日所知的奥萨尔联合邦国才终于成形：一个由数百个世界的领袖与国王组成的议会，在奥萨瑞尔星王的监督下，以议会制政府的形式运作。

original: The Joint Ausar Federation made first contact with humanity some few generations after its founding when a human colony ship contacted an ausar colony on the fringes of then-known space. Thanks to the quantum communications technology the human ship carried, the ausar were able to quickly interconnect their homeworlds in ways never before thought possible, causing a revolution of information sharing and communication. In turn, the Federation provided the humans with the technology to replicate their Warp Gates, which instantly allowed the human colonies, separated by gulfs of space but connected by communication, to physically connect and trade. Almost overnight, the human race went from hundreds of scattered worlds to a connected empire comparable in size to their new galactic neighbors.
translation: 奥萨尔联合邦国成立几代之后，才与人类初次接触。当时，一艘人类殖民飞船在已知空间的边缘地带，联系上了一个奥萨尔殖民地。多亏了人类飞船搭载的量子通信技术，奥萨尔人得以用前所未想的方式，迅速将各个家园世界互联，引发了一场信息共享与通信的革命。作为回报，联邦向人类提供了复制折跃门的技术。这让那些被太空鸿沟隔开、却因通信而相连的人类殖民地，瞬间实现了物理上的连接与贸易。几乎一夜之间，人类就从数百个分散的世界，变成了一个疆域堪与银河新邻居比肩的互联帝国。

original: Eventually, the Joint Ausar Federation and the newly formed Terran-Space Coalition would, alongside more and more alien races discovered by both, form the United Galactic Confederacy, which now serves as the ruling body for much of known space.
translation: 最终，奥萨尔联合邦国与新成立的地球空间联盟，连同双方不断发现的更多外星种族，共同组建了银河联合邦联。如今，这已是大部分已知星域的统治机构。

original: The Scarlet Federation
translation: 猩红联邦

original: The Scarlet Federation is the governing body of the Red Myr on Myrellion. The Federation is ruled by a junta of generals, collectively known as the High Command, and is heavily militarized compared to their Gold Myr neighbors. Full citizenship -- and the right to vote -- are gated behind Federal service (usually, but not always, military), and many large industries are government-backed private ventures run by citizens.
translation: 猩红联邦是米瑞利安星球上红米尔人的统治政权。联邦由将军们组成的军政府统治，统称为最高统帅部，与他们的金米尔人邻居相比，其军事化程度极高。完整的公民权——以及投票权——以联邦服役（通常是但不限于军事服役）为前提，许多大型产业都是由公民经营的、有政府背景的私营企业。

original: History:
translation: 历史：

original: The Scarlet Federation was formed from several disparate city-states of red myr who lived far to the north-east of the gold myr heartlands, and on another continent. Near their territory were several of the largest cities of nyrea, as well as over “monsters” from the barren wastelands of the far north. The Federation was formed during a series of unification wars, which eventually saw most of the red myr cities (and a handful of nyrean ones) collected under one banner. The Federation was formed in the same generation as the Red-Gold war, and several veterans from the unification conflicts fought in the world war that followed.
translation: 猩红联邦由几个分散的红米尔城邦组成，这些城邦位于金米尔中心地带的东北方，远在另一片大陆上。靠近他们领土的是尼瑞亚最大的几座城市，以及来自遥远北方贫瘠荒原的“怪物”。联邦在一系列统一战争中形成，最终将大部分红米尔城市（以及少数尼瑞亚城市）收归同一面旗帜之下。联邦与红金战争诞生于同一世代，统一战争中的不少老兵随后又投身于那场世界大战。

original: Even before the Federation’s formation, however, tensions were high between the red myr cities and the larger Gilden Republic to the west. Several border skirmishes were fought between the two races, and hostility was steadily on the rise until the start of the Red-Gold conflict. The war began with a dogfight between red and gold air forces, and has since escalated to total world war, with the Scarlet Federation having pushed deep into Gilden Republic territory. The conflict was escalating towards the use of weapons of mass destruction before an ausar expedition arrived in Myrellion’s airspace.
translation: 然而，早在联邦成立之前，红米尔诸城与西边更庞大的鎏金共和国之间便已剑拔弩张。两个种族间爆发过数次边境冲突，敌意节节攀升，直至红金之战全面打响。战争由红金双方空军的缠斗拉开序幕，随后升级为席卷全球的大战，猩红联邦的兵锋已深深楔入鎏金共和国的腹地。冲突愈演愈烈，眼看就要动用大规模杀伤性武器，一支奥萨尔探险队恰于此时抵达了米瑞利安领空。

original: Of the two races, the Federation was the second to employ chemical weapons, but the first to develop nuclear ones.
translation: 两个种族之中，联邦是第二个动用化学武器的，却是第一个研发出核武器的。

original: The Terran-Space Coalition
translation: 泰拉空间联盟

original: The main governing body of Terra.
translation: 泰拉的主要管理机构。

original: History:
translation: 历史：

original: Earth’s government, growing out of the United Nations in the early 25th Century. While humanity doesn’t play a huge role in the galactic scene, the exploits of adventurers like Victor Steele have done wonders to put mankind on the forefront of public thought, especially as adventurers and colonists line up for the newest Planet Rush. Terra itself is far-removed from the “fringes” of U.G.C. space, and therefore strongly emphasizes that it cannot and will not protect its citizens outside its borders. This firmly localized policy has caused a significant population build up in the core worlds of Coalition space, while human pirates and outlaws are free to roam unimpeded through foreign space on the fringes with little fear of interference.
translation: 地球政府脱胎于25世纪初的联合国。人类在银河舞台上的戏份虽不重，但维克多·斯蒂尔这等冒险家的壮举，却让人类成了万众瞩目的焦点——尤其当冒险者和殖民者蜂拥而至，争相投身新一轮大淘星潮时。泰拉本身远离邦联空间的“边陲”，因此极力强调：疆界之外，它不能、也不会保护自己的公民。这种固守本土的政策，导致联盟核心星域人口急剧膨胀，而人类海盗与亡命之徒却在边陲的外域空间横行无忌，几乎不用担心有人来管。

original: The T.S.C. is governed by a Parliament based on Terra, with duly elected representatives from all Coalition-controlled worlds representing the public interest. Though all member planets must abide by Coalition law, they are each free to individually govern themselves in any way they see fit within that scope -- one human planet may be a metropolis visited by a thousand alien races each day while another may be a domineering dictatorship under a mega-corporation’s thrall.
translation: T.S.C.由设在泰拉的议会治理，所有联盟辖下世界均通过正式选举产生代表，以维护公众利益。各成员星球虽须遵守联盟法律，却可在这一框架内，以自认为合适的方式自由自治——一个人类星球，可能是每日有上千外星种族往来的繁华都会；另一个，则可能是受巨型企业操控的专制独裁之地。

original: It should be noted that, while the Coalition would like to imply that they are the face of humanity, the truth is there are hundreds of colonies and stations filled with humans outside Coalition jurisdiction. While the T.S.C. is the most prevalent human government, it is by no means the only one. The Terran military is relatively strong and technologically advanced, but highly concentrated in the core worlds. T.S.C.S. Odyssey, the flagship, is one of the most advanced starships in the U.G.C. Most Terran starships are slow, lumbering vessels with exceptional armor and moderate shields, but relatively low weapons power: they rely primarily on firing lines for combat effect, and starfighter escorts and planetary bombers are the primary force projection for Coalition fleets.
translation: 应该指出，联盟虽想暗示自己是人类的代表，但事实上，联盟管辖范围之外，还有数百个殖民地和空间站里住满了人类。T.S.C.固然是最普遍的人类政府，却绝非唯一。泰拉军队相对强大，技术先进，但高度集中于核心世界。旗舰T.S.C.S.奥德赛号，是U.G.C.中最先进的星舰之一。大多数泰拉星舰都是缓慢笨重的舰船，装甲出众，护盾中等，但武器威力相对较低：它们主要依靠火力线来达成战斗效果，而星际战斗机护航和行星轰炸机才是联盟舰队的主要力量投射手段。

original: With the new Planet Rush beginning and hundreds of thousands of colonists waiting and raring to go, Coalition presence in the fringe has increased somewhat, with a small fleet of cruisers and escorts patrolling the edge of Coalition space, ready to respond to emergency distress calls put out by the colonists -- a rare exception to the localization policies the fleet usually observes. However, this does not by any means guarantee safety, and any human colonist or explorer operating beyond Terran space is strongly warned that they may be on their own if disaster strikes.
translation: 随着新一轮大淘星潮开启，成千上万的殖民者翘首以待、跃跃欲试，联盟在边缘地带的存在感也随之增强。一支由巡洋舰和护航舰组成的小型舰队在联盟空间边界巡逻，随时准备响应殖民者发出的紧急求救信号——这是舰队通常奉行的本地化政策中罕见的例外。然而，这绝不意味着安全无虞。任何在泰拉空间之外活动的人类殖民者或探险家，都受到严正警告：一旦灾难降临，他们或将孤立无援。

original: The United Galactic Confederacy
translation: 银河联合邦联

original: The centralized governing body of the universe.
translation: 宇宙的中央管理机构。

original: History:
translation: 历史：

original: The U.G.C. is the current central government of the universe. As a government, it’s just cohesive enough to function. Representation in its central, law-making body (the Parliament) is determined by the amount exported from the planet, which has lead to some rather odd scenarios, like an agricultural planet importing food so that they can export their entire crop, gaining more power on the galactic stage.
translation: 银河联合邦联是当今宇宙的中央政府。这个政府勉强维持着运作所需的凝聚力。其核心立法机构（议会）的席位，竟由各星球的出口总额决定。这催生了不少怪象，比如农业星球进口粮食，只为把自产作物尽数出口，好在银河舞台上多攥些权柄。

original: Universal laws require a two thirds majority to pass, and as a result, not that many laws get passed. Those that do are often backed by nearly all large corporations or immense political pressure from the public. Because of this, local governments have a large degree of freedom to govern themselves, so long as they follow trade protocols.
translation: 普遍性法律需获三分之二多数票才能通过，因此真正能通过的法律并不多。那些能通过的，要么有几乎所有大企业的支持，要么承受着来自公众的巨大政治压力。正因如此，地方政府只要遵守贸易协定，便享有极大的自治权。

original: Slavery is technically illegal within the U.G.C., but indentured servitude remains. Most indentured servants are treated fairly. There DOES remain a sizable portion of shady corporations and people that charge their servants unscrupulously to keep them perpetually in debt and unable to free themselves from their contracts.
translation: 在银河联合邦联，奴隶制名义上是非法的，但契约奴役依然存在。大多数契约仆人都能得到公正对待。不过，仍有相当数量的黑心企业和个人，会不择手段地向仆人收取费用，让他们永远背负债务，无法摆脱契约的束缚。

original: The U.G.C. maintains a standing military including advanced ships and technology. However, those ships are technically kept near the core and used to suppress any rebellion. Planets at or near the rim, particularly ones newly added to the warp-gate network recently, tend to receive little protection and even less direct oversight.
translation: U.G.C. 拥有一支常备军，配备着先进的战舰和技术。不过，这些战舰名义上都部署在核心星区附近，用来镇压叛乱。那些位于边缘地带或靠近边缘的行星，尤其是最近才接入折跃门网络的，几乎得不到什么保护，更谈不上直接监管了。

original: The Confederacy is viewed with a mixture of suspicion, fear, and awe out on the borders.
translation: 在边境地带，人们对邦联既疑惧，又敬畏。

original: Stormguard
translation: 风暴卫士

original: A neo-pagan religion whose roots can largely be traced to Terra, the Stormguard are best described as a warrior-cult. They advertise themselves as dedicated to honor, prowess, and a connection to nature, wherein they believe the gods lie.
translation: 风暴卫士是一种新异教信仰，其根源主要可追溯至泰拉，最好将其描述为一个战士教团。他们宣称自己致力于荣誉、武艺以及与自然的联结，他们相信诸神便寓居于自然之中。

original: Stormguard priests teach that holiness is found in one’s strength. Because of their eagerness to prove their prowess, Stormguard have developed something of a mercenary reputation on the frontier, as they are commonly hired on as muscle by private security and planet rusher groups. Those who do not venture into the void in search of battles are often found on the most hostile and storm-wracked planets in the galaxy, which they view as being the closest places to their mercurial gods.
translation: 风暴卫士的牧师教导说，圣洁源于自身的力量。由于急于证明自己的勇武，风暴卫士在边疆地带博得了几分雇佣兵的名声——私人安保公司和星球掠夺团常雇他们充当打手。那些不深入虚空寻求战斗的人，则多半出没在银河系最险恶、风暴最烈的星球上，在他们眼中，这些地方最接近他们那喜怒无常的神明。

original: The most prominent Stormguard temples are found on the Venusian colonies, in the Taizen system, and on the moon Uveto VII. Unlike many modern religions, the stormguard make their temples like homes (or perhaps more accurately, like castles), with dozens of members living and training within them at any one time. In addition to religious instruction, Stormguard temples provide combat and survival training.
translation: 最著名的风暴卫士神庙位于金星殖民地、太真星系和乌维托七号卫星上。与许多现代宗教不同，风暴卫士将神庙建得像家（或者更准确地说，像城堡），任何时候都有几十名成员在其中生活、训练。除了宗教教导，风暴卫士神庙还提供战斗和生存训练。

original: Some errant warriors, called Storm Lancers, travel on the frontier in search of worthy foes to prove themselves against in honorable duels. Others join adventuring companies or mercenary units for the same reasons, eager to see the most dangerous places of the galaxy.
translation: 一些被称为风暴枪骑兵的流浪武士在边疆游历，寻找值得一战的对手，在光荣的决斗中证明自己。另一些人则出于同样的原因加入冒险团或雇佣兵部队，渴望见识银河系最危险的角落。

original: History:
translation: 历史：

original: The Stormguard were formed sometime before the current era of Planet Rushes, with the earliest references to their culture dating back to around the time of humanity’s First Contact with the ausar and other pre-Confederacy races. Along with the Church of One and several other early human religions, the Stormguard spread quickly across the galaxy, though limited by their small numbers and comparatively few resources.
translation: 风暴卫士成立于当前淘星潮时代之前的某个时期，其文化最早可追溯至人类与奥萨尔人及其他前邦联种族首次接触的年代。与唯一教会及其他几个人类早期宗教一样，风暴卫士迅速传遍银河系，但受限于其规模较小且资源相对匮乏。

original: The Stormguard of Uveto in particular are a hardy faction, having established themselves before the full corporate takeover of the world. Ever since the Camarilla and other corporate interests have taken control of the planet, the Stormguard temple there has fought tooth and nail within the legal system, exploiting religious protection acts to prevent their eviction from the frosty world. Lucky for them, they’ve created a symbiotic relationship with the ausar colony on Uveto, acting as scouts, guides, and beast-hunters for the otherwise pacifistic inhabitants.
translation: 乌维托的风暴卫士尤其是一支坚韧的派系，早在企业全面接管这颗星球之前便已在此立足。自卡马利亚与其他企业势力掌控该行星以来，当地的风暴卫士圣殿便在法律体系中殊死抗争，利用宗教保护法案阻止自身被逐出这片冰霜世界。幸运的是，他们与乌维托上的奥萨尔人聚居地建立了共生关系——为这些天性平和的居民担任侦察兵、向导与巨兽猎手。

original: Star: Sigillum Dei, white dwarf star.\n\tSolar System: 2 inner planets (Mome secondary), 5 outer (gas giants). All colonized/claimed by the Camarilla.\n\tEndemic Sapients: Toves, Leyak (disputed).
translation: 恒星：神印星，白矮星。\n\t星系：2颗内行星（莫姆星为次星），5颗外行星（气态巨行星）。全部由卡马利亚殖民或宣称主权。\n\t本土智慧物种：托维人、雷亚克（存在争议）。

original:
• Oriab (surface): City-sized tourist resort for visitors to Mome
  • E Absagala (surface): A massive spire with a space elevator used for trade
  • E Absagala (aquatic): A surface and sub-aquatic trade depot
  • E Engura (aquatic): the Camarilla’s center of government
  • Miskaton (surface/aquatic): Galactic legal library curated by the Camarilla
  • Born-of-High-Sun-Neap-Tide-North-Eastern-Cold-Winds (airborne, drifting): An ancient and massive yukkoth, home to the largest leyak collective
translation:
• 奥里亚布（地表）：城市规模的旅游胜地，供前往莫姆的游客使用
  • E 阿布萨加拉（地表）：一座巨大的尖塔，配有用于贸易的太空电梯
  • E 阿布萨加拉（水生）：一个地表与水下贸易中转站
  • E 恩古拉（水生）：卡马利亚的政府中心
  • 米斯卡顿（地表/水生）：由卡马利亚管理的银河法律图书馆
  • 生于高阳-小潮-东北-寒风（空中，漂流）：一个古老而巨大的尤科斯，是最大雷亚克集群的家园

original:
Mome is a planet of vast, shallow seas, similar to Earth during the Cambrian era. Most of the land is covered with a single species of foot-high terrestrial algae, and the widest variety of life is aquatic. Oddly, evolutionary paths on Mome ignored the relatively sparse landmasses, and diverged based on aerial lifeforms and aquatic ones. The skies of Mome are filled with vast clouds of floating invertebrates, aerial jellyfish the size of blimps, and predatory fish that adapted to life in the skies.
	
	Mome’s skies are light orange, similar in tone and gradient to Earth peaches. This color is most intense around the equator, fading closer to the poles. The cause of this is a high concentration of an airborne nepenthe algae that relies on carotene for photosynthesis, absorbing the high ultraviolet radiation of Mome’s white dwarf star, and tinting the atmosphere orange. The exception to this is at the poles of the planet which are cooler and do not facilitate the algae as well. Most arial invertebrates of Mome are (to varying degrees) filter feeders that subsist mainly on the nepenthe algae. They, in turn, are consumed by the airborne fish that function as the dominant predators of Mome.
	
	Mome’s seas are likewise rich in life, the vast amount of algae present giving it a green tint. Most species of coral in Mome’s seabeds are rich in anthocyanins, and when eroded, contribute to the “purple” sands of the planet. Plant life in Mome’s oceans consists of varying species of kelp with occasional sargassum forests providing unique biomes.
	
	Landmasses in Mome are few, and surprisingly lacking in biodiversity. Most landmasses are either extrusions of dark, volcanic rock or covered in the soft sand produced by Mome’s reefs. Only two solely-terrestrial species exist on Mome’s landmasses: a grass-like algae, and a single species of grazing crab. 
	
	Mome’s surface is speckled with spires reaching up from the seas, with the majority of tove civilization located beneath the surface, with dense, three-dimensional cities located in the depths. Transportation between metropolitan areas is conducted via transport tube, where a combination of gravity and pressure manipulation allows commuters to move at high speed through miles-long clear tubes. Smaller tubes meant for short range travel and used within cities, while larger ones stretch thousands of miles from hydropolis to hydropolis. 
	
	Orbital space around Mome is densely packed and obsessively coordinated in order to make for the various trade ships and advertising satellite rigs. At any given time, there are at least 12 Camarilla wabeships in orbit around Mome, accompanied by massive holographic scrolling advertisements, each several miles wide. A veritable fleet of communication satellites crowd the spaces between them, keeping up a perpetual barrage of advertisements, trade deals, and investment information. Streams of seeder pods (Camarilla shipping containers) are also in constant movement, both from Wabeships down to trade spires, and from Wabeships out to the greater galaxy.
translation:
莫姆星是一颗遍布广阔浅海的星球，类似于地球的寒武纪时期。大部分陆地被单一物种的齐踝陆生藻类覆盖，而最丰富的生命形态存在于水中。奇特的是，莫姆星的进化路径忽略了相对稀疏的陆地，转而以空中生命体和水生生命体为分支发展。莫姆星的天空中遍布着大片的浮游无脊椎动物云团、飞艇大小的空中水母，以及适应了空中生活的掠食性鱼类。
	
	莫姆星的天空呈浅橙色，色调和渐变类似地球上的桃子。这种颜色在赤道附近最为浓烈，向两极逐渐变淡。其成因是空气中高浓度的空中猪笼藻，这种藻类依赖胡萝卜素进行光合作用，吸收莫姆星白矮星的高强度紫外线辐射，将大气染成了橙色。唯一的例外是星球的两极，那里温度较低，不利于这种藻类繁衍。莫姆星的大多数空中无脊椎动物（在不同程度上）是主要以猪笼藻为食的滤食动物。它们反过来又被作为莫姆星顶级掠食者的空中鱼类所捕食。
	
	莫姆星的海洋同样生机勃勃，大量的藻类使其呈现出绿色。莫姆星海床上的大多数珊瑚物种富含花青素，经侵蚀后，形成了这颗星球的“紫色”沙滩。莫姆星海洋中的植物由各种海带物种组成，偶尔出现的马尾藻森林则提供了独特的生物群落。
	
	莫姆星的陆地面积很少，且生物多样性出奇地匮乏。大多数陆地要么是深色火山岩的突出物，要么被莫姆星珊瑚礁产生的柔软沙子所覆盖。莫姆星的陆地上仅存两种纯粹的陆生物种：一种类似草的藻类，以及一种以之为食的螃蟹。
	
	莫姆星表面点缀着从海中升起的尖塔，而托维文明的主体位于地表之下，密集的三维城市坐落于海洋深处。大都市之间的交通通过运输管道进行，利用重力和压力的综合调控，通勤者能以高速穿越数英里长的透明管道。较小的管道用于短途出行，在城市内部使用；而较大的管道则绵延数千英里，连接着一座又一座水下都市。
	
	莫姆星周围的轨道空间拥挤不堪，且被极其严密地协调管理，以便容纳各种贸易飞船和广告卫星平台。任何时候，莫姆星轨道上都至少有12艘卡马利亚的波浪飞船，伴随着巨大的全息滚动广告牌，每个都有数英里宽。一支名副其实的通信卫星舰队挤满了它们之间的空隙，持续不断地进行着广告、贸易协议和投资信息的轰炸。播种荚舱（卡马利亚的货运集装箱）流也在持续移动，既从波浪飞船向下运往贸易尖塔，也从波浪飞船向外运往更广阔的银河。

original: There are arguably two sapient species endemic to Mome: the toves and the leyaks. While the toves maintain a galactic presence in the form of the Camarilla, the leyak exist offworld only as an invasive species, maintaining a state of para-sapience.
translation: 莫姆星上公认有两种本土智慧物种：托维人和雷亚克人。托维人以卡马利亚的形式在银河系中保持着存在感，而雷亚克人则仅作为入侵物种存在于外星，维持着一种准智慧状态。

original: Predation from arial fish at various points in their evolution forced the tove ancestors into deeper and deeper water, where they built vast civilizations in the depths. There, tove society advanced. As their technology advanced, they ventured back to the surface, building spires and eventually venturing into space. Somewhat unusual among the space-faring species of the galaxy, toves have no appreciable sex drive, reproducing out of conscious necessity. Toves are amphibious, and while most comfortable in water at high pressures, can function on land for significant bouts of time. Toves use a modular language that often confuses translation software, resulting in nonsensical-sounding portmanteaus.
translation: 在其进化历程的各个阶段，来自空中鱼类的捕食压力迫使托维人的祖先进入越来越深的水域，并在深海建立了庞大的文明。托维社会由此得以发展。随着科技进步，他们重返水面，建造高塔，并最终踏入太空。在银河系的众多航天物种中，托维人有些不同寻常，他们没有明显的性冲动，繁衍后代纯粹出于有意识的必要。托维人是两栖生物，虽然在高压水中最为舒适，但也能在陆地上长时间活动。托维人使用一种模块化语言，常常让翻译软件感到困惑，从而产生听起来荒诞不经的混合词。

original: Leyak evolved as symbiotes, feeding on microorganisms and the larger cloud-sized yukkoth jellyfish that dominate the upper troposphere and lower stratosphere. On Mome, clouds of leyak generally swarm yukkoth, attaching themselves to its biomass to feed off of its jelly, but using their stings to defend yukkoth from predatory fish. Leyak genetic memory reaches extremely far back, and does not necessarily include markers for time, but does include significant geological events and knowledge of some species that are only present in the fossil record. Despite a lack of construction and material goods, leyak culture is clearly evident, with extensive delving into the arts. Leyaks contain, within their genetic memory, expansive sagas, music, philosophies, and complex verbal games. Leyaks are para-sapient, capable of conscious thought only when food is readily available, and shutting down higher functions when food is scarce.
translation: 雷亚克作为共生体演化，以微生物和主宰着对流层上层与平流层下层的、云朵般庞大的尤科斯水母为食。在莫姆星上，成群的雷亚克通常簇拥着尤科斯，附着在其生物质上吸食胶质，同时用螫刺保护尤科斯免受掠食性鱼类的侵害。雷亚克的遗传记忆可追溯至极其久远的年代，其中未必包含时间标记，却铭刻着重大的地质事件，以及对某些仅存于化石记录中的物种的认知。尽管缺乏建筑与物质财富，雷亚克的文化依然鲜明可辨，对各类艺术有着深入的钻研。它们的遗传记忆中蕴藏着浩瀚的史诗、音乐、哲学体系以及复杂的语言游戏。雷亚克属于准智生物，只有在食物充足时才能进行有意识的思考，一旦食物匮乏便会关闭高级认知功能。

original: The official Camarilla stance is that leyak are non-sapient, as official recognition of such could award them potential rights on the galactic scale and a legal claim to Mome as well. Among the Camarilla arguments are that the leyak’s para-sapient nature negates their rights as a fully sapient species. Until recently, many Camarilla traders even engaged in the sale of leyaks as pets to off-world buyers. However, many collectors or fanciers were horrified to find that the brilliantly-colored pets they purchased actually begged for freedom upon being fed. Leyaks are now an invasive species on several planets, leaving many governments with difficult ethical questions about removal.
translation: 卡马利亚的官方立场是，雷亚克是非智慧生物，因为若官方承认其智慧，可能会赋予它们在银河系范围内的潜在权利，以及对莫姆星的合法所有权。卡马利亚的论点之一是，雷亚克的类智慧本质否定了它们作为完全智慧物种的权利。直到最近，许多卡马利亚商人甚至还将雷亚克作为宠物出售给外星买家。然而，许多收藏家或爱好者惊恐地发现，他们购买的色彩鲜艳的宠物在喂食时竟会乞求自由。如今，雷亚克已成为多个星球上的入侵物种，这让许多政府在清除问题上陷入了艰难的伦理困境。

original:
• Nepenthe Algae: An airborne species of algae in Mome’s atmosphere. Present everywhere except the poles. Not harmful, though some offworlders claim that breathing it causes a soothing effect.
  • Shantak: A predatory species of flying eel.
  • Yukkoth: City-sized jellyfish that drift through Mome’s upper atmosphere. Though passive and slow moving, they are capable of steering around Camarilla-built spires.
  • Nothoa: A massive species of anemone domesticated by toves, used for anchoring and underwater construction. Individuals are black and yellow in coloration and can range from several feet wide to over a dozen feet in diameter.
  • Grazing Crab: A football-sized species of crab that subsists on terrestrial algae and often harbors patches of the algae on its back.
  • Claw Shrimp: Big claws on ‘em. Live real deep. Big as a man.
translation:
• 猪笼藻：莫姆星大气层中的一种浮游藻类。除两极外遍布全球。对人体无害，不过一些外星访客声称吸入它会带来舒缓效果。
  • 尚塔克：一种掠食性飞鳗。
  • 尤科斯：城市般大小的水母，漂浮在莫姆星的高层大气中。尽管行动被动且缓慢，但它们能够绕开卡玛利拉建造的尖塔。
  • 诺索亚：一种被托维人驯化的巨型海葵，用于锚定和水下建造。个体呈黑黄相间的颜色，直径从几英尺到十几英尺不等。
  • 食草蟹：一种足球大小的螃蟹，以陆生藻类为食，背上常附生着片片藻类。
  • 钳虾：长着一对大钳子。生活在极深水域。体型如人一般大。

original: Called “black diamonds,” adjite is a rare, crystalized mineral with strong, bio-morphic reactions to organic life. Resistant to corrosives and ionizing radiation, this precious stone has an obsidian-like, semi-translucent color when held to light. It features a slightly porous, hydrophane structure. This means that, if exposed to fluids for prolonged periods, the gem loses its hardness and takes on a softer, gummy texture. This treatment can be used to make mass storage and transportation safer for anyone likely to touch the crystals. The reason for this precaution is immediately apparent to anyone who has been in direct contact with adjite for any length of time. Despite being both non-toxic and completely digestible, the gems tend to produce a considerable increase in bodily fluid production. Prolonged exposure may also result in swelling of body parts with high blood flow. It is sometimes used in powdered form as a base for illegal, knock-off genemods. It is likewise sometimes shaved down and supersaturated to serve as little, gummy bubbles for extremely bio-active drinks, typically by unwisely enthusiastic individuals. Exposure to either tends to result in explosively prolific climaxes, in addition to possible permanent organ swelling. Long term consequences are being studied, though the relative rarity of the mineral in explored space makes it difficult to obtain satisfactorily large sample sizes for published findings. Those who lick it have reported — after their tongue swelling goes back down — that It has a slightly alien, strawberry flavor.
translation: 被称为“黑钻”的埃迪石是一种稀有的结晶矿物，能与有机生命产生强烈的生物形态反应。这种宝石耐腐蚀、抗电离辐射，在光照下呈现出黑曜石般的半透明色泽。其结构略带多孔亲水性，这意味着若长时间接触液体，宝石会失去硬度，转变为柔软胶状质地。通过这种处理方式，可使大宗储存运输更安全，避免接触晶体的人员受到直接影响。 采取这种预防措施的原因，任何曾直接接触过埃迪石的人都会立刻明白。尽管这种宝石既无毒又可完全消化，但它往往会显著增加人体体液分泌。长时间接触还可能导致血流密集的身体部位肿胀。 有时它会被研磨成粉末，用作非法山寨基因改造药剂的基础成分；也会被削薄并过度饱和处理，制成供极度生物活性饮品使用的小胶珠——通常由那些狂热而不计后果的人士操作。接触这两种形态都可能导致爆发性剧烈高潮，并可能造成永久性器官肿胀。其长期影响仍在研究中，不过由于该矿物在已探索星域中相对稀有，难以获得足够大的样本量来发表研究结果。 那些舔过它的人报告称——在舌头肿胀消退后——它带有一种微妙的异星草莓味。

original: Ring Ice
translation: 环冰

original: Also known as: Ice, Glitterball, Rusher, Stardust, Unfettered, Zs, New Coke
translation: 别名：冰、闪光球、冲锋者、星尘、无拘者、Z's、新可乐

original:
Z-methylsavinitrate is a powerful, addictive chemical stimulant. Originally created through research into muscular hypertrophy caused by early human space exploration, the substance is still sometimes prescribed to those recovering from serious injury or depression. However, it is better known for its status as a party drug. Less potent derivatives are found in other market stimulants such as Priapin and ClearYu.

	Ring Ice marries some of the effects of savicite to a methamphetamine vector that is powderable and inhalable to most forms of sapient life. In its powdered form, it takes on the distinctive glittering pale blue hue that gives it its most popularly known name. It causes a rush of energy, a feeling of euphoria, a large uptick in both sexual appetite and stamina, and increased receptiveness and alertness. Repeated or higher dosage may cause psychosis, facial bleeding, heart palpitations and the sensation of being able to fly or see through surfaces. 
	
	The possession and manufacture of Ring Ice is illegal in most U.G.C. controlled zones beyond government-approved pharmaceutical corporations, however its traffic is rampant, particularly in frontier territories. It is believed to be the second most popular recreational narcotic in the galaxy, behind Roshan Blue.
translation:
Z-甲基萨维硝酸酯是一种强效、易成瘾的化学兴奋剂。该物质最初是通过研究早期人类太空探索导致的肌肉肥大而诞生的，至今仍有时被开给那些从重伤或抑郁症中恢复的人。然而，它更广为人知的身份是派对毒品。在普利平和清羽等其他市售兴奋剂中，也能找到其效力较弱的衍生物。

	环冰将萨维西特的某些效果与一种甲基苯丙胺载体结合，使其能被大多数智慧生命形式研磨成粉并吸入。在粉末形态下，它呈现出独特的、闪闪发光的淡蓝色调，这也是它最广为人知的名字的由来。它会带来一股能量冲击、欣快感、性欲和耐力的大幅提升，以及更强的接受度和警觉性。重复或更高剂量使用可能导致精神病、面部出血、心悸，以及感觉自己能飞翔或看穿墙壁的幻觉。
	
	在银河联合邦联控制的大部分区域，未经政府批准的制药公司之外，持有和制造环冰均属非法，然而其流通却十分猖獗，尤其是在边疆领地。据信，它是银河系中第二受欢迎的娱乐性麻醉品，仅次于罗珊蓝。

original: BionaHoles
translation: 生物圣杯

original: Manufactured By: TamaniCorp
translation: 制造商：塔玛尼公司

original: For thousands of years, sapients have concealed their dicks in boxes. Now, with the TamaniCorp BionaHole, the reverse is just as possible.
translation: 数千年来，智者们一直将他们的阴茎藏在盒子里。如今，有了塔玛尼公司的生物圣杯，反过来也同样可行。

original: About:
translation: 关于

original: Perhaps the most controversial of TamaniCorp’s wide range of products, the BionaHole came about after a failed venture into all-natural artificial wombs. Though the main project went grossly over budget due to the insistence of the company CEO personally sampling a huge number of paid male test candidates, the scientists working on the artificial wombs managed to salvage some of the tech behind it and turn it into a high-end sex toy: the BionaHole.
translation: 塔玛尼公司产品线中最具争议的，大概要数生物圣杯了。它的诞生，源于一次失败的纯天然人造子宫研发项目。尽管由于公司CEO坚持亲自“面试”大量付费男性测试者，导致主项目预算严重超支，但负责人造子宫的科学家们还是设法挽救了其中的部分技术，并将其转化为一款高端情趣用品：生物圣杯。

original: At its core, the BionaHole is a cloned vagina - complete with lips, clitoris, and channel... and the ability to become excited when played with - suspended in a thick black tube laden with life-support tech to keep the sex organ alive, wet, and warm. The vaginal passage is designed with greatly increased sensitivity compared to its natural base, and will actually achieve orgasm through vigorous use. All BionaHoles are equipped with self-cleaning abilities and the capacity for minor self-repair thanks to a healthy dose of microsurgeons. So long as the owner regularly changes out the proprietary nutrient packs and keeps the flask charged (either through a small solar battery or a conventional electrical port), the cloned pussy can remain healthy and enjoyable for decades.
translation: 在其核心，生物圣杯是一个克隆阴道——拥有完整的阴唇、阴蒂和阴道腔……并且在被玩弄时能够产生兴奋——它悬浮在一个厚重的黑色管体中，管内装载着生命维持技术，以保持这个性器官的存活、湿润和温暖。该阴道通道的设计使其敏感度相比其天然原型大幅提升，并且实际上会通过剧烈的使用达到高潮。所有生物圣杯都配备了自清洁能力，并因注入了足量的微型外科医生而具备轻微自我修复的能力。只要主人定期更换专用的营养包并保持培养瓶充电（可通过小型太阳能电池或传统电源接口），这个克隆阴道就能保持健康并带来享受长达数十年。

original: BionaHoles reached their peak popularity shortly after launch with their modelled line, featuring cloned vaginas of recognizable sex symbols; like the galaxy’s number one hyperporn actress Nivas Oxonef to TamaniCorp’s own lascivious CEO. Since the product line’s introduction, several additional models have come out, modelled after mouths, anuses, and several exotic alien sexual organs.
translation: 生物圣杯在推出后不久便达到了人气顶峰，其推出的仿制系列产品，复刻了多位知名性感符号的克隆阴道；从银河系头号超色情演员尼瓦斯·奥克斯内夫，到塔玛尼公司那位放荡的首席执行官本人。自该产品线问世以来，又陆续推出了多款新模型，仿制对象包括口腔、肛门，以及数种奇特的外星性器官。

original: Of course, the BionaHole met with a great deal of controversy after its introduction, especially from anti-cloning political groups. Even today, the product remains fairly niche and is regarded as being fairly “deviant” by the mainstream sex industry, due to the living nature of the toy. However, it has certainly found a market for itself, especially among wealthy playboys who won’t settle for anything less than the “real thing” as a safer and more convenient alternative to intercourse - or simply a practice tool for their sexual escapades.
translation: 当然，生物圣杯自推出以来便引发了巨大争议，尤其是来自反克隆政治团体的抨击。即便在今天，这款产品依然相当小众，并因其活体特性而被主流性产业视为相当“离经叛道”的存在。不过，它无疑找到了自己的市场，尤其受到那些只愿享用“真货”的富家浪子青睐——既可将其作为更安全便捷的交合替代品，亦可单纯当作他们猎艳冒险的练习工具。

original: Bubble Buddy
translation: 泡泡宝贝

original: Manufactured By: TamaniCorp
translation: 制造商：塔玛尼公司

original: “Hi. I’m Tamani, founder and CEO of TamaniCorp. I spend all day thinking about YOUR cum. Let me assure you, the Bubble Buddy will keep that baby batter fresh and potent until the heat death of the universe!”
translation: “嗨，我是塔玛妮，塔玛尼公司的创始人兼首席执行官。我整天都在琢磨你的精液。放心，泡泡宝贝能让你的精华保持新鲜活力，直到宇宙热寂的那一天！”

original: About:
translation: 关于

original: TamaniCorp stands by the saying “There’s no testing like public testing!” Their wide variety of fertility and virility enhancing products undergo extensive trials and it’s not always easy to get a diverse array of subjects into their corporate offices. For that matter, it’s not easy to get their employees out to the testing facilities, considering how many tend to be pregnant at any given time. The Bubble Buddy was an invention of necessity. They chiefly needed a device that could store semen samples safely, maintaining their heat and potency in a sustained, self-sealing container.
translation: 塔玛尼公司信奉这样一句话：“公开测试，才是最好的测试！”他们旗下品类繁多的助孕壮阳产品，都要经过大量试验。可想把形形色色的受试者弄进公司办公室，向来不是件容易事。反过来说，想把员工拉到测试机构去也不简单——毕竟随时都有大批人挺着大肚子。泡泡宝贝应运而生，实属无奈之举。他们急需一种装置，能安全储存精液样本，在一个持续自密封的容器里，锁住温度和活力。

original: The sheath proved so popular among testers that TamaniCorp decided to market it publicly as a masturbation aide and inexpensive, reusable semen storage tool. Since then, it has become a popular alternative to traditional cryogenic sperm banks. Among Rahn and Galotian citizenry, the distinctive purple cum bubbles are considered a trendy snack. TamaniCorp officially encourages its amorphous consumers to post pictures of themselves enjoying the cum pouches on extranet photo-sharing sites.
translation: 事实证明，这个护套在测试者中非常受欢迎，因此塔玛尼公司决定将其作为手淫辅助工具和廉价、可重复使用的精液储存工具公开销售。从那时起，它就成了传统低温精子库的流行替代品。在拉恩和伽洛蒂亚人中，独特的紫色精液泡泡被视为一种时髦的零食。塔玛尼公司正式鼓励其无定形消费者在外联网照片共享网站上发布自己享用精液袋的照片。

original: Grav Cuffs
translation: 引力手铐

original: Manufactured By: TamaniCorp
translation: 制造商：塔玛尼公司

original: About:
translation: 关于

original: Grav-cuffs are the latest in space age bondage gear designed by the sex-loving TamaniCorp. The cuffs are packed full of features; nearly as many as some mainstream androids.
translation: 引力手铐是爱好性爱的塔玛尼公司设计的最新太空时代捆绑装备。这种手铐功能齐全，几乎和一些主流的机器人一样多。

original: The most notable quality of the cuffs is that they are mass adjustable. Once attached, one can make the cuffs (and the cuffed individual) weigh as much or as little as they want. They are also uni-directional, so they can be used to attach the cuffed person to a roof, wall, or other surface with little effort.
translation: 这副镣铐最出众的特性，在于其重量可随心调节。一旦戴上，便能让镣铐（连同被铐之人）变得轻若鸿毛，或重如泰山。它还具有单向吸附之能，因此不费吹灰之力，就能将人固定在屋顶、墙壁，或是任何表面之上。

original: Premium cuffs come with several special features, such as a magni lock feature for fastening different cuffs together, voice activation, and a vocal locking system.
translation: 高级手铐附带多种特殊功能，比如可将不同铐环固定在一起的磁力锁、语音激活和声控锁定系统。

original: Grav-cuffs are notoriously hard to break out of.
translation: 引力手铐是出了名的难以挣脱。

original: Holodom
translation: 全息套套

original: Manufactured By: JoyCo
translation: 制造商： 乔伊公司

original: Description: Hard light holographic condom, or “holodom.”
translation: 描述：硬光全息避孕套，或称“全息套套”。

original: About:
translation: 关于

original: Holodoms were one of JoyCo’s first adult products and largely considered their “first big break” in the industry. The unassuming metal ring is a one-use hardlight shield designed to be worn around the penis. Activated by a small touch sensor, it is comfortable to wear and small enough that its presence is barely felt by both parties.
translation: 全息套套是乔伊公司最早推出的成人用品之一，被普遍视为他们在业界的“头号爆款”。这枚不起眼的金属环是一次性硬光护盾，佩戴在阴茎上。轻触传感器即可激活，佩戴舒适，体积小巧，双方几乎感觉不到它的存在。

original: Before the holodom, galactic citizens had to rely on other less enjoyable methods of safe sex. Traditional condoms reduced sensation, body modification and implants were troublesome, and oral supplements were not always cross-species compatible. The holodom offered a quick, easy way to have sex with practically any species without worrying about impregnation or disease.
translation: 在全息套套问世之前，银河系公民只能靠其他不那么舒服的方式来保证安全性行为。传统避孕套会降低快感，身体改造和植入又麻烦，口服补充剂也未必能跨物种通用。全息套套则提供了一种快捷简便的方式，几乎能和任何物种做爱，还不用担心怀孕或染病。
